creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
"Public Domain" is not a license, therefore it will never be in the database.  It's obviously intentionally absent.

Here's how you indicate PD in port as an example:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/textproc/words/Makefile?revision=347786&view=markup

Also check Mk/bsd.license* for more information.
